model_pricing.notes: GPT-4.1 Mini. Current OpenAI rate as of March 2026.
GPT-4o. Pricing cut from $5/$15 in late 2024 to $2.50/$10. Current OpenAI rate March 2026.
GPT-5.4 flagship. 272K context (1M experimental). OpenAI API pricing March 2026.
GPT-5.4 Mini. 400K context. ~30% of flagship cost. Launched March 17, 2026.
GPT-5.4 Nano. 400K context. Ultra-low cost for batch/classification tasks. Launched March 17, 2026.
Gemini 3 Flash Preview. 1M token context. Released Dec 17, 2025. Default model in Gemini app.
Gemini 3 Flash. 1M token context. GA release of Gemini 3 Flash.
Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite Preview. Cheapest Gemini 3 text lane. $0.50/1M audio input. March 2026.

Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview. 1M token context. Released Feb 19, 2026; replaced gemini-3-pro-preview on Mar 9, 2026. Standard pricing ≤200K tokens: $2/$12. Above 200K: $4/$18 input/output. Batch pricing: $1/$6 (≤200K). Thinking tokens included in output cost.
Perplexity Sonar. 127K context. Lightweight search model. Search requests billed separately at $5/1K.
Perplexity Sonar Reasoning. 127K context. Higher output cost reflects chain-of-thought reasoning tokens.
Perplexity Sonar Reasoning Pro. 128K context. Advanced reasoning with search grounding.
Perplexity Sonar Pro. 200K context. Flagship search+synthesis model.
Perplexity Sonar Deep Research. 128K context. Multi-step retrieval + reasoning. Search queries billed at $5/1K separately.
Claude Opus 4.6. 200K standard context (1M beta). Released February 2026. 67% cheaper than Opus 4.1 era ($15/$75). Premium long-context (>200K) billed at $10/$37.50.
Claude Sonnet 4.6. 1M token context (beta). Released February 17, 2026. Default model on claude.ai. Long-context requests (>200K input) billed at $6/$22.50.
